text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One morning, as I arrive at the academy gate...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ohh! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Good morning! Isn't this weather the best?
choice_data_list: Why are you wearing your signature racewear?
Why are you wearing your signature racewear?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We've got a biiig test today! If I fail, I'll need to
take extra classes!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I actually tried my best to study, but I'm not
confident at all...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's where the signature racewear comes in!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, you know—when I wear this, I feel like I can
win any race, right?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So if I take my test in my racewear, I'm sure I'll get
a WAY better score!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having confidence will probably help her on the
test, but I can't imagine her teacher will like it.
choice_data_list:
Let's explain the racewear to your teacher
together.

You should hurry and change into normal
clothes.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa, wait, huh?! Are you really coming with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that, as her trainer, I should help explain
the effect of the racewear in avoiding the need
for extra classes.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean you're going to watch over me
during my test?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Then I'll definitely get full marks! Yay!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Come on, let's hurry to the classroom! Hehe, this
is just like parents' day!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Teeeaach! I brought my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Oh? But why? And why are you wearing your
racewear?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! I'm gonna get full marks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I explain the situation, the teacher agrees
to let Ticket stay in her racewear. All that's left is
to see how she fares...

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
N-no way! Usually Winning Ticket barely manages
to scrape by in tests...

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
B-but she got a perfect score?! It's only a quiz,
but this is incredible!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! I did it! FULL MAAARKS!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It's all thanks to my racewear! I'm SUPER happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ticket is overjoyed, but the shocked teacher,
trembling before the might of the racewear,
forbids her from wearing it again to class.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Why can't I take the test dressed like
this?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Is that for real?! Hmm, I don't want that...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I hate doing extra classes even more. Are you
sure I can't use the power of my racewear?
choice_data_list: Maybe you'll get better results in your uniform.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that when she's wearing her uniform, she
might remember things she heard while in class.
This makes her think.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaahhhh! I'm so s-sorryyyy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
My uniform was always, ALWAYS with me when I
studied... It tried so hard to help me, but I...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I almost left my precious partner behind... I'm so sorry for thinking of betraying yoouuu! Sniffle!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I won't do that ever again! Let's get through the test together !

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Trainer, thanks for helping me understand!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wait for me, uniform! I'll come and get changed
right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Winning Ticket puts her uniform on and
takes the test. Her results are... well, good
enough to avoid having to take extra classes.
